comment: Default-FAIL verification contract. Checks flipped to true only after their command ran and evidence was inspected this session. Stack is docs (README.md/USERGUIDE.md + the T-011 traceability addendum); no compile toolchain applies to the changed files themselves (lint/typecheck/build waived per risk-gate-matrix.md low/docs, mirroring specs/knowledge-mcp/verification/T-009.contract.json). Unlike a pure compile-check waiver, T-011's Done When explicitly requires the full npm test suite to stay green (confirming no code was touched) and a doc-content cross-check against mcp/ci-mcp/src/ and install.sh, so unit-tests/acceptance-tests/regression carry real green evidence (shared CI tests.log, 137/137, copied verbatim) rather than a pure waiver -- same 'green-but-not-tier-required' treatment as the knowledge-mcp T-009 reference. required_workflow is test-after: only green_evidence is populated for the test-type checks; there is no T-011-red.txt and none is expected (test-after has no red phase) -- T-011-green.txt is itself the grep-based doc-verification cross-check plus the full re-run of npm test. requirement-traceability is also not tier-required at low; T-011's core purpose IS finalizing the REQ->AC->TEST->Task chain (19/19 rows Verified in reports/implementation/ci-mcp/T-011.md), so that addendum plus T-011-green.txt is recorded as its evidence rather than re-running check-traceability.sh (specs/ci-mcp/traceability.md/.json are frozen post-review per WFI-004 and were not re-validated by this task).
